health.notes: Prefers warm tea after walks. Slow to trust new faces.
Enjoys talking about politics and football. Speaks slowly.
Sometimes forgets she has eaten. Loves classical music and old films.
Recovering from surgery — physiotherapy three times a week. Cautious on stairs.
Loves to share family photos. Best visits are mid-morning.
Lost his wife two years ago. Quietest in the late afternoon — likes a calm presence.
Independent and active. Family lives in London — values regular British company.
Needs help transferring from bed to chair. Calmest with familiar Arabic music.
Recently widowed. Mornings are hardest. Loves cooking Egyptian dishes with company.
Stroke affected left-side mobility. Loves cricket and Hindi cinema.
Lights up when spoken to in Russian. Loves old Soviet-era melodies.
Prefers afternoon visits. Enjoys conversation about old Abu Dhabi.
Loves classical Arabic music and afternoon tea on the balcony.
Cautious on stairs. Loves cricket commentary and tamarind rice.
Independent and active. Family in the UK — values familiar company.
Calmest with traditional Emirati music and the smell of bukhoor.
Loves backgammon and old Egyptian films.
Likes quiet mornings. Prefers visits before lunch.
Recently widowed. Values steady, warm company.
Loves political discussion and old French songs.
Lights up around women her age who speak Bengali.
Calm with familiar Egyptian music. Anxious around new faces.
Loves Urdu poetry. Patient, slow speech.
Loves Filipino soap operas and adobo. Family back home.
Independent. Enjoys long conversations about football and politics.
Quiet, dignified man. Loves desert photography books.

Most settled mid-morning. Loves Bengali folk songs.
